herg_comparison.selectivity_mechanism: Positive charge on peptide attracts C2_Protease_B GLU166, neutral to hERG

selective_variants.name: MPRO_SEL_K2
selective_variants.modification: Q2->K (Lys near W1 for GLU166 attraction)
selective_variants.rationale: Lysine at position 2 can form salt bridge with GLU166 in S1 pocket

selective_variants.name: MPRO_SEL_R6
selective_variants.rationale: Arginine at position 6 provides bidentate H-bonding to GLU166

selective_variants.name: MPRO_SEL_C_K
selective_variants.rationale: C-terminal Lys extends toward GLU166 without disrupting core Z² geometry

selective_variants.name: MPRO_SEL_N_K
selective_variants.rationale: N-terminal Lys for alternative anchor orientation

selective_variants.name: MPRO_SEL_K2R6
selective_variants.rationale: Dual positive anchors for maximum GLU166 interaction and hERG rejection

recommendation: MPRO_SEL_K2R6 (dual positive anchor) for maximum selectivity
